titleStmt.title: SII 38.28: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 28. (A.R. No. 28 of 1912.) TIRUCHCHENDŪR, TIRUCHCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT. On the pillar set up in the Subrahmaṇya temple.

p.hi: King: Vikrama Pāṇḍya Year Kollam 620, Chitirai 6, śu. di. 5, Friday Mṛigashīra, 1444-45 A.D. Other details are Irregular.

summary.p: This record registers the sale of 2 mā of land in Peruṅkaruṇai-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Maṅgalakūruchi in Tiruvaḻudi-vaḷanāḍu, which was earlier gifted by Raṇaraṅga Rāmaperumāḷ alias Vikrama Pāṇḍya to three bhaṭṭas, Attigirinātha Bhaṭṭaṉ of Cheṭṭalūr, Nārayaṇa Bhaṭṭan of Tirumāliruñjōlai and Kēśvan, exempting from all the taxes, to Nakkiradēva Nāyinār in the temple of Subrahmaṇya-piḷḷaiyār at Tiruchchendalūr for 630 Kaliyugaramāṉ paṇam.

It is also stated that before this sale, the land was leased out to Taṇḍeyuṉ kālumaḻagiya Muḍaliar for providing food offerings twice daily, for maintaining a perpetual lamp and also for providing a garland (tirumālai) to the god Subrahmaṇyapiḷḷaiyār. However, the land was resumed after submitting the necessary documents and was now sold to Nakkiradēva Nāyinār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kollam 6 100 2 10
kaḷu cittirai mātam 6 nāḷ
pūṟuvapakkattup pañ
camiyum veḷḷivāra
mum copaṉa yokamum
peṟṟa mirukaciriṣattu nā
ḷ(ku) kuṭanāṭṭut tirucce
ntalūr tiṟaipuvaṉamā
tevicaturvetimaṅkalattu
nayiṉār cuppiramaṇṇiyappiḷḷai
yār koyilil naṟkiratevar nayi
ṉāṟkku karuṅkuṭināṭṭup parākkiṟama
pāṇṭiyaccaturvetimaṅkalattup
paṭṭarkaḷil Aridakottirattu Āpa
ttampa cūttirattuc ceṭṭalūr Attikiri
nātapaṭṭaṉum tirumāliruñcolai
nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉuṅ kecavaṉ
maṉumeramaMay be read ‘maṉoramaṉ’tāṉaiṟaiyili vilai
ppiramāṇañ ceytu kuṭutta paricā
vatu muṉṉāḷ Iraṇaraṅkarāma
p perumāḷ Āṉa vikkiṟamapāṇ
ṭiya tevar Utakapūṟuva taṉmatāṉa
m Ākaccātaṉa yuttamākat tantu nāṅ(ka)
ḷ Eṅkaḷil Aṅkikarittuk koṇṭu
Aṉupavittup potukiṟa tiruvaḻuti
vaḷanāṭṭu maṅkalakkuṟicciyāṉa
peruṅkaruṇaiccaturvetimaṅkalat
tunaṭuviṟ kaṭṭaḷai taṭi Iraṇṭu 2

ṅkālukku vaṭakku marutam mutal tara

ṟ kaṭaiyattiṟappu nikkik kiḻakkaṭai

ṭaikālukkut teṉmeṟkut tūṟṟu
c ceyakūli I 2mā 1kāṇi ku kūli ... Iraṇṭān ta
rattukkuk kiḻakkum nayiṉār nalantika
ḻ niṉṟār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukku
meṟkum Iraṇṭāntaram kūli2 § Orumā ¿
ñku kuṭitāl teṟkaṭaiyat tiṟappu ni
kki vaṭakkaṭaiya 2mā m Āka 2mā I
ṉṉilam Iraṇṭu māvukkum vilai nic
ceyitta Aṉṟāṭu vaḻaṅkuṅ kaliyukarā
maṉ 1 6 100 3 10 Ippaṇam Aṟunūṟṟu mu
ppatuṅ kāñai yirukka Uḻakkuṭi
p periyanayiṉār taṇṭaiyaṅkālu
m Aḻakiyār muṉṉāḷ Innāyiṉār cu
ppiramaṇṇiyappiḷḷaiyārkku nā
ḷ Oṉṟukku Irunāḻi Amutupaṭiyu
m Oru tirunantāviḷakkum Oraṇai
t tirumālaiyuṅ kaṟpittu naṭantu
potukiṟa Itu cantirātittavaraiyu
m naṭakkumpaṭi taṇṭaiyuṅ
kālumaḻakiyār Āṟumukapperumāḷ
kaṟpittu Iṉṉilam vilai ko
ḷḷuvikkaiyil Ivaruṭaṉ paṟ
ṟik koṇṭu tāṉam peṟṟa tirumu
kamuṅ koṭuttu Iṉṉilam Iraṇ
ṭu māvum vilaiypiramāṇa
ñ ceytu kuṭuttom Attikirinātapa
ṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārom naṟkirate
varnayiṉārkku Ipparicu viṟṟa tā
ṉaiṟaiyili 2mā kkum Ituve
vilaiolaiyum poruṭcela
vuolaiyum Ākak
kalliluñ cempilu
m veṭṭik koḷḷu
mpaṭi viṟṟu vilaippi
ramāṇañ ceytu kuṭu
ttom Attikirinātapaṭ
ṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār O
manṟa cīratevarnayiṉā
rkku Ippaṭi Attikirinātapaṭ
kirinātapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
tirumāliruñcolai
nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu 1 paṟpanāpapa
ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu kecavaca
ṉmaṉ Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ
colla Intat tāṉai
ṟaiyili vilaippiramā
ṇam Eḻutiṉa valla
nāṭṭu melaikkuṟicci
Āṉa vikkiṟamapāṇ
ṭiyaccaturvetimaṅkala
ttukkuravaicerit ti
ruveṅkaṭanārāyaṇa
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ
murappanāṭṭup pirama
tecam śrīpojaḷavi
racomitevaccaturve
ti maṅkalattupattām
paṇṇai perumāḷ
nampiyār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
